title: Tick Control in University Heights, Bronx | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in University Heights, Bronx. Protect your family from Lyme disease with expert tick treatment. Starting at $125. Call today!
intro: University Heights residents face growing tick concerns in parks, yards, and green spaces throughout this historic Bronx neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services to protect families and pets from tick-borne diseases in University Heights. Our targeted treatments eliminate ticks from your property while keeping your outdoor spaces safe and enjoyable.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served University Heights for years, understanding the unique pest challenges facing this diverse neighborhood near Fordham Road and Bronx Community College. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets, with flexible scheduling to accommodate the busy lifestyles of University Heights residents.
localContext: University Heights' tree-lined residential streets, proximity to University Woods Park, and the green spaces around Hall of Fame Terrace create ideal habitats for ticks. The neighborhood's mix of multi-family homes, brownstones, and apartment buildings with shared yards requires specialized tick prevention strategies to protect the entire community.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in University Heights?
faqs.answer: University Heights has numerous parks, wooded areas like University Woods, and residential yards where ticks thrive. With families frequently using outdoor spaces near Fordham University and local playgrounds, professional tick control is essential to prevent Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses that are increasingly common in the Bronx.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in University Heights?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in University Heights range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer free inspections and customized treatment plans for single-family homes, multi-family properties, and shared outdoor spaces common in the neighborhood.

faqs.question: When is tick season in University Heights, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Ticks are active in University Heights from early spring through late fall, with peak activity from April through September. However, mild winters mean ticks can be present year-round in the Bronx. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining protection throughout the warm months for optimal results.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions and typically recommend keeping people and pets off treated areas for 2-4 hours until dry. Our treatments target ticks while minimizing environmental impact.
